seed_instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules.
org_constraint: The "body" must contain no more than 100 words.
new_constraint: The "body" must contain at least 150 words.
instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules. The "body" must contain no more than 100 words. The "body" must contain at least 150 words.
response:
This request contains a logical paradox. It is mathematically impossible to write a body of text that is simultaneously "no more than 100 words" and "at least 150 words."

Because these two constraints are mutually exclusive, I cannot fulfill the request as written. Please let me know if you would like me to prioritize one of the constraints over the other!<turn|>
